name: MYRadiologyImpacsRISSyncOperation
title: IMPACS RIS Sync Operation
publisher: Data Team, Digital Health Division, Ministry of Health Malaysia
description: OPTIONAL RadioConnect direct-RIS retrieval operation retained as a supported partner pattern. It allows a consumer to request a parameter-driven searchset Bundle for a specified time window. The returned bundle shall include the matched business resources and any referenced supporting resources needed for internal bundle references to resolve cleanly. Standard resource read and search interactions remain the national baseline.

parameter.name: from
parameter.documentation: Required start of the polling window.

parameter.name: to
parameter.documentation: Required end of the polling window.

parameter.name: _count
parameter.documentation: Optional maximum number of records to return.

parameter.name: _page
parameter.documentation: Optional paging parameter when results exceed the requested count.

parameter.name: patientId
parameter.documentation: Optional patient identifier to restrict the sync response to one patient.

parameter.name: return
parameter.documentation: A self-resolving searchset Bundle containing the matched ServiceRequest, ImagingStudy, and DiagnosticReport resources together with referenced Patient, Encounter, Practitioner, PractitionerRole, Organisation, Location, Procedure, Observation, and Endpoint resources where needed.
